buy_side_bullets: Rotating into financials (XLF ~$300M) with tech at 9-year portfolio low of 9.43%; 'massive disruption' ahead over 3-4 years; long US stocks but hedge the dollar. [Druckenmiller shift]

US equity market 'most expensive we've ever seen since we began managing money' — Greenlight closed to new investors July 1; +6.5% in Q1 vs S&P -4.4% driven by direct macro instruments (gold, copper, rates). [Einhorn]

AI bull market has 'another year or two to run' — feels like 1999; buying baskets of AI stocks but warns 'breathtaking corrections' await at +40% additional upside; existential AI regulation risk growing. [Tudor Jones]
'No chance' of Fed rate cuts in 2026; unadjusted inflation ~6.5%; DoubleLine at 17-year lowest risk position; 30/20/30/20 non-dollar allocation (non-US stocks/real assets/bonds/cash). [Gundlach]

'Capital wars' — Big Cycle at most dangerous phase; three simultaneous threats: policy recession, foreign confidence erosion, AI arms race; 1-2% GDP drag from tariffs; diversify globally, long gold. [Dalio]
sell_side_bullets: BofA Bull & Bear Indicator at 9.6 (extreme bullishness = contrarian 'Sell' signal); only 21 stocks (4% of S&P 500) at new highs — March 2000 breadth collapse parallel; 'anything but bonds' era; 25/25/25/25 portfolio. [Hartnett]

Financial repression for 10-15 years: inflation 4-5.5% with rates held below; debt-to-GDP from 300% to 200% requires 15 years of government-directed investment; gold is signaling the new monetary regime. [Napier]
S&P 500 at 7,483 (+9.3% YTD); target 8,250; possible Fed rate hike July 29 FOMC (5% market odds); Roaring 2020s base case at 60% probability; 3% GDP + 2.5% productivity. [Yardeni]

2026's biggest macro surprise: 'pronounced disinflation that nobody seems to see right now' — counter-consensus vs. inflation-forever narrative; July 21 webcast with Mike Wilson to debate rate path. [Rosenberg]

Recession probability lowered to 30% (from 50%) — rotation trade not recession trade; AI capex echoes pre-2001 telecom; hyperscalers hold $2T AI assets by 2030 with devastating FCF collapse. [Berezin evolving]
